aihot.notes: Highest-priority source for AI trend information. Prefer the skill feed, then AI HOT RSS when skill access is unavailable.

rsshub.notes: General RSS/RSSHub adapter for non-AI HOT subscriptions.

browseract.notes: Used when RSSHub only returns snippets or a page needs browser rendering.

mediacrawler.notes: Fallback collector only. Do not use for large-scale crawling or commercial production with the open-source non-commercial edition.
